ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Africa, Americas) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infection_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "infection_date" TEXT /* Date of the infection data */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new confirmed cases */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of confirmed cases */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of cases requiring hospitalization */,
  "icu_rate" REAL /* Percentage of cases requiring ICU care */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of cases (JSON) */,
  "expected_change" TEXT /* Expected change in daily cases */,
  "reproduction_no" REAL /* Effective reproduction number */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of growth */,
  "doubling_halving_time" INTEGER /* Doubling/halving time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_data_reproduction_no FOREIGN KEY ("reproduction_no") REFERENCES reproduction_numbers ("reproduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_data_doubling_halving_time FOREIGN KEY ("doubling_halving_time") REFERENCES doubling_halving_times ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_data_expected_change FOREIGN KEY ("expected_change") REFERENCES case_changes ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_data_growth_rate FOREIGN KEY ("growth_rate") REFERENCES growth_rates ("growth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of expected change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expected change (e.g., Increasing, Likely decreasing) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expected change */,
  "change_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the expected change (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reproduction_numbers" (
  "reproduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reproduction number entry */,
  "reproduction_no" REAL /* Effective reproduction number */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the reproduction number was calculated */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the reproduction number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reproduction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_rates" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate entry */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of growth */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the growth rate was calculated */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doubling_halving_times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doubling/halving time entry */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Doubling/halving time in days */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the doubling/halving time was calculated */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the doubling/halving time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_data" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the COVID-19 variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "first_detected" TEXT /* Date when the variant was first detected */,
  "spread_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the variant spreads */,
  "mutation_details" TEXT /* Details of the mutations in the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_infection_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infection rate entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variant */,
  "infection_rate" REAL /* Infection rate of the variant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the infection rate was calculated */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the infection rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_infection_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_infection_rates_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variant_data ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health intervention */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., lockdown, mask mandate, vaccination drive) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expected impact */,
  "cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_interventions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact entry */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the public health intervention */,
  "change_in_rate" REAL /* Change in infection rate due to the intervention */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the actual impact */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the change in rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES public_health_interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., epidemiologist, data scientist) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications (JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the research paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the paper */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the paper was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the paper */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the paper has received */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* List of funding sources (JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., infection, variant, intervention) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES infection_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
